label: Admin / diagnostics
items: Plant Library — when a Gemini call exhausts every model in the cascade, the failure message now shows the per-model outcome (e.g. "flash-lite-3.1 (3x): 503 overloaded", "flash-lite-2.5 (3x): 503 overloaded", "flash-preview (3x): 503 overloaded", "pro-preview (3x): quota exceeded") instead of just whichever model happened to fail last. Makes it obvious whether the cascade actually tried everything.
